comparison_base.assumption: Used master per the verifier handoff prompt; current local master and merge base matched.

commands_run: git --no-pager diff master...HEAD -- include/gui/TacticalDamageSummaryGUI.h src/gui/TacticalDamageSummaryGUI.cpp tests/tactical/FTacticalDamageSummaryGUITest.h tests/tactical/FTacticalDamageSummaryGUITest.cpp tests/gui/TacticalGuiLiveTest.cpp doc/DesignNotes.md
cd tests/tactical && make && ./TacticalTests && cd ../gui && make && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests
cd tests/tactical && ./TacticalTests | tail -n 20 && cd ../gui && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests | tail -n 30
test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: tactical and live GUI coverage exercise the labeled rollup section, enabled detail section, disabled detail suppression, empty-state dialog path, and WXTacticalUI smoke flow; verifier reruns passed with OK (88 tests) tactical and OK (25 tests) GUI.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: doc/DesignNotes.md matches the final dialog behavior and coverage without overstating unimplemented UI changes.
security_summary: No security issues identified in the reviewed presentation and regression-coverage scope.
